title: Expressions, Decisions, and Iteration · Behavior Brief: Switch Semantics
summary: Route support cases through explicit rules and iterate changing record sets without truthiness or termination defects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js switch semantics increment in a transparent support-case routing engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use switch matching, scoped cases, fallthrough, and default behavior deliberately.
Express mutually exclusive branches, guard clauses, and exhaustive fallbacks without unreachable paths.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
